OmopHelpers 0.1.3

mergeCodelists

Source: R/utils.R
mergeCodelists.Rd

Merges multiple `codelist` objects from the `omopgenerics` package into a single new `codelist`. It combines all concept IDs from the input lists and removes any duplicates.

Usage

mergeCodelists(..., newName)

Arguments

...

An arbitrary number of `codelist` objects to be merged.

newName

A character string specifying the name for the new merged codelist.

Value

A single, merged `codelist` object named according to the `newName` parameter.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Assuming bb_codes and ccb_codes are valid codelist objects
first_line_therapies <- mergeCodelists(bb_codes, ccb_codes, newName = "first_line_hcm_drugs")
} # }
